key.name: switch-to-previous-workspace-on-active-monitor
key.summary: Switch to previous virtual workspace on active monitor
key.description: Rotate windows on the active monitor to the previous virtual workspace.

key.name: switch-to-next-workspace-on-active-monitor
key.summary: Switch to next virtual workspace on active monitor
key.description: Rotate windows on the active monitor to the next virtual workspace.

key.name: toggle-monitor-selection-mode
key.description: Toggle between Pointer mode and Focus mode for choosing the active monitor.

key.name: use-custom-monitor-labels
key.description: If enabled, monitor labels will come from "monitor-labels".

key.name: monitor-labels
key.description: Array of labels indexed by GNOME monitor index. Example: ["1","2"] means monitor 0 is labeled "1" and monitor 1 is labeled "2".

key.name: monitor-selection-mode
key.description: How the extension chooses which monitor the hotkeys apply to. - 'pointer': monitor under mouse pointer (stable even when workspace is empty) - 'focus' : monitor of focused window (can jump if focus jumps)

key.name: pill-mode
key.description: - 'focused' : show only the active monitor state - 'all' : show compact state for all monitors
